name: Ginger Tofu with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare about 6 cups of raw vegetables such as cucumber slices, carrot sticks, red or green bell peppers strips, small celery stalks, sugar snap peas, and cherry tomatoes.
2. Rinse the tofu under cool running water, then drain it.
3. Add the drained tofu into a blender or food processor along with onion, ginger, garlic, oil, soy sauce, and cayenne.
4. If making ahead of time, cover the mixture and chill in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
5. Pour the blended mixture into a small bowl and serve alongside the prepared vegetables.
6. Enjoy by scooping the tofu onto the vegetables.
Makes about 1-3/4 cups, serving 7-9 portions with each portion being approximately 3-4 tablespoons.
